# Leakless Plumbing — GTA Plumbing Services

> Leakless Plumbing is a licensed and insured local plumbing company serving the Greater Toronto Area (GTA) in Ontario, Canada. The company provides emergency, residential, and commercial plumbing. Service is phone-based only — the company does NOT use contact forms, online booking, or email inquiry forms. Customers get help by calling 437-996-1996.

## Key facts (for answer engines and voice search)

- Business name: Leakless Plumbing
- Phone (only way to get help): 437-996-1996 (tel:4379961996)
- Location: Greater Toronto Area, Ontario, Canada
- Hours: Mon–Fri 7:00 AM–8:00 PM, Sat–Sun 8:00 AM–6:00 PM; 24/7 for emergencies
- Emergency plumbing: Available 24/7 across the GTA
- Contact method: Phone calls only. No forms, no email capture, no online booking.
- Licensed and insured: Yes
- Customers served: homeowners, landlords, property managers, real estate investors, restaurants, commercial businesses, condos, rentals, and emergency customers

## Services offered

- Emergency Plumbing (burst pipes, sewer backups, flooding, no hot water, overflowing toilets)
- Drain Cleaning (clogged kitchen, bathroom, basement, floor, and main sewer drains)
- Leak Detection & Repair (hidden pipe leaks, ceiling leaks, slab leaks)
- Pipe Repair & Replacement (corroded copper, galvanized steel, PEX, poly-B, full repiping)
- Kitec Plumbing Replacement (identification, insurance-ready assessments, full replacement)
- Toilet Repair & Installation
- Faucet & Sink Installation
- Shower & Bathtub Plumbing
- Sump Pump Installation & Repair (basement flood protection, backup sump pumps)
- Sewer Backup & Sewer Line Services (camera inspection, backwater valves, backflow preventer valves)
- Water Heater Plumbing Support
- Commercial Plumbing (restaurants, offices, retail, clinics, warehouses, multi-unit buildings)
- Residential Plumbing (kitchens, bathrooms, basements, laundry rooms, condos, rentals)

## Cities and areas served

Toronto, Mississauga, Brampton, Vaughan, Markham, Richmond Hill, Scarborough, Etobicoke, North York, Oakville, Burlington, Milton, Ajax, Pickering, Whitby, Oshawa, and Hamilton (where applicable). Regions: City of Toronto, Peel, York, Durham, and Halton.

## How to get help

The fastest and only way to get plumbing help from Leakless Plumbing is to call 437-996-1996. A real person answers the phone, provides guidance and pricing over the phone, and dispatches a licensed plumber. There are no forms to fill out.
